name: @adopt-dont-shop/authz
description: Backend-side authorisation helpers that mirror adopt-dont-shop's existing permission-string model. Wraps the DB-driven Permission set (sourced via UserRole → Role → RolePermission) with hasPermission + requirePermission helpers plus optional rescue/owner scope checks. No new vocabulary, no CASL — same shape as lib.permissions, just usable from any extracted backend service.
